block_01: The iphone maker has seen a slowdown in smartphone sales, as consumers do not see a reason to upgrade to a new iphone model, as technological advancements on smartphones reached a diminishing return. Arguably the slowdown in iphone sales is the biggest reason why Apple closed the year in red with its shares losing 7% in value.
block_02: Apple CEO Tim Cook sent a letter to investors sighting a slowdown on iphone sales in Greater China as a consequence of the trade war between U.S. and China. Tim also noted a deceleration in iphone upgrades on some developed countries. At the time of this writing Apple lost close to 7% of its market value before recovering.
